name: Grave Filler
short_description: It's the night shift, and Batbo needs help filling in some graves in the graveyard! Help him by dropping rocks, dirt, bugs, and mushrooms into the grave and watch them merge into bigger and bigger graveyard treasures! Shoveling dirt can be hard when you don't have any fingers!
detailed_description:
It's the night shift, and Batbo needs help filling in some graves in the graveyard! Help him by dropping rocks, dirt, bugs, and mushrooms into the grave and watch them merge into bigger and bigger graveyard treasures!

Grave Filler is a simple ball drop puzzle game! Earn points and use them to buy Batbo new outfits and dress to impress as you help him with his night shift! Shoveling dirt can be hard when you don't have any fingers!

Features
  • score multiplier for consecutive merges
  • charms that change how the game is played
  • unlockable mechanics, like swapping your current ball for your incoming, and drops with special effects that shake up game play
  • personal high score board
  • cute outfits for Batbo
